name: Bloody Good Friends
short_description: Explore Mirian's world in the Bloody Good Friends visual novel! Spend time at school with her friends, learn about characters, interests, future plans and dreams! Just beware of the demons of the past that won't stop chasing you!
detailed_description:
Info:
Duration: about 3h
Languages: English, Polish
Type: visual novel

Bloody Good Friends is a touching visual novel about Mirian, who's only desire is to spend time with her friends during class. What's the worst that could happen?



Shi, Yakedo i Yami – Mirian's best friends. Learn about their characters, interests, future plans and dreams. Spend time with them during lessons and meal breaks. Discover why their pack is probably the most harmonious team in the whole world!



Dan although he was part of the best friends' pack, he always stood a bit on the sidelines.

Game Features:

  • Beautifully drawn characters and backgrounds.
  • Dialogues containing deep thoughts, telling a story with a little twist.
  • Fascinating characters with unique characters and stories.
  • Engaging group relationships.
  • Beautiful music.

Warning:.
The game contains descriptions and images that may be violent and execrable, not intended for minors. Please decide if you surely want to play.
